title: autac_v1 — AUTAC sub-axis output rows
description: Output schema for _python_bridge/module/autac_sim.py. One row per AUTAC degrader: the mass-action target tagging, the S-guanylation autophagy-tag LC3-recruitment competence, the autophagic-flux completion partition (flux_partition = k_fusion/(k_fusion+k_stall)), and the steady-state autophagic degradation flux. AUTAC is a SUB-AXIS :> BIFUNCTIONAL (expansion-main, AXIS/HIERARCHY.tape @D sub_under_bifunctional) — NOT a hexa-bio core-5 axis. Research-stage modality, in-silico simulator-consistency only (AGENTS.tape g8/f2).

autac.description: AUTAC identifier within the deterministic panel.

cargo_type.description: Cargo class degraded by selective autophagy (e.g. cytosolic-protein, fragmented-mitochondria, aggregate-prone-protein).

drug_precedent.description: Own precedent for the modality (g3/f1 — described by precedent, never lattice-derived). AUTAC is research-stage.

tag_competence.description: S-guanylation-tag -> K63-Ub/p62/LC3 engagement competence surrogate, in [0,1].

k_seq_per_min.description: Cargo sequestration rate into a forming autophagosome (per min).

theta_target.description: Mass-action fractional occupancy of the target by AUTAC.

flux_partition.description: Fraction of autophagosomes completing lysosomal fusion = k_fusion/(k_fusion+k_stall).

stalled_partition.description: Fraction of autophagosomes that stall without fusion = k_stall/(k_fusion+k_stall).

flux_class.description: Autophagic-flux classification by the flux partition.

degradation_flux_per_min.description: Steady-state autophagic degradation flux = lc3_recruitment * k_seq * flux_partition (per min).
